# Michael Walzer

*1935 – ? · American*

American political philosopher: he renewed just war theory by grounding it in the rights of persons and in shared moral experience, between strict prohibitions (non-combatants) and limit cases (the supreme emergency).

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
